edgeTypes.label: SUBSCRIBED_TO
edgeTypes.description: Links a SaaS account to its active or historical subscription

edgeTypes.label: USES_FEATURE
edgeTypes.description: Links a SaaS account to a product feature it has adopted

edgeTypes.label: CAUSED_BY
edgeTypes.description: Links a production incident to the deployment that triggered it

edgeTypes.label: SUBMITTED_BY
edgeTypes.description: Links a support ticket to the account that submitted it

edgeTypes.label: REQUESTED_BY
edgeTypes.description: Links a feature request to the account that requested it

edgeTypes.label: RELATES_TO_DEAL
edgeTypes.description: Links a support ticket to a deal it may impact

edgeTypes.label: RESOLVED_FOR
edgeTypes.description: Links an incident to an account that was affected by it

edgeTypes.label: DEPLOYED_TO_ACCOUNT
edgeTypes.description: Links a deployment to an account it was rolled out to

edgeTypes.label: TRACKS_PRODUCT
edgeTypes.description: Links a market landscape entry to a related product in the landscape
